---
title: "News"
pagetitle: "News — Martin Lukk"
subtitle: "A running log of publications, talks, media, and other updates."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
  type: custom
  template: ../_templates/news-item-grouped.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  page-size: 50
  fields: [date, title, news_title, categories, hide_in_news]
  feed: true
---

{{< include ../_includes/news-filter.html >}}

::: {#listing-listing}
:::
